summary: Completed testing of Word Search grid generation and Host dashboard polling bug fixes. All 7 features verified as WORKING. Fixed unreachable code issue in PlayToLearnGame.js (duplicate return statement at line 170).
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: Removed duplicate return statement at line 170 in PlayToLearnGame.js (unreachable code)
Word Search grid generation (lines 51-168): Correctly increases grid size based on longest word (effectiveSize = Math.max(size, longestWordLength + 2))
Word Search uses 500 attempts + force placement fallback to ensure all words are placed
Word Search only displays words that were successfully placed (actualWords state)
Word Search shows warning toast if any words fail to place
Host dashboard polling interval correctly set to 5000ms (5 seconds) at line 93 in PlayToLearnHost.js
Mode selection broadcast works for both LIVE and SELF_PACED sessions (lines 885-893 in play_to_learn.py)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Word Search and Host dashboard bug fixes fully tested. Key verifications: (1) Word Search grid dynamically sizes to fit longest word, (2) All words including MELANCHOLY (10 chars) are placed and displayed, (3) Drag selection works with yellow highlighting, (4) Host dashboard polls every 5 seconds, (5) Mode selection badges (Memory, Quiz, Fill) display correctly for ALL_MODES sessions, (6) Real-time and Connected indicators visible in Host dashboard.

dynamic_grid_sizing.description: Grid size increases based on longest word (effectiveSize = Math.max(size, longestWordLength + 2))
dynamic_grid_sizing.evidence: Code review at lines 52-54 in PlayToLearnGame.js

all_words_placed.description: All 5 words including MELANCHOLY are displayed in badges
all_words_placed.evidence: Screenshot shows MELANCHOLY, PREDICTION, MAINIDEA, PREFIX, INFER badges

force_placement_fallback.description: Uses 500 attempts + force placement to ensure words are placed
force_placement_fallback.evidence: Code review at lines 74-156 in PlayToLearnGame.js

warning_on_failed_placement.description: Shows toast warning if words fail to place
warning_on_failed_placement.evidence: Code at lines 44-47: toast.warning('Some words may be missing from the grid')

only_placed_words_displayed.description: Only words that were actually placed are shown (actualWords state)

drag_selection_works.description: Drag selection highlights cells in yellow
drag_selection_works.evidence: Screenshots show yellow highlighted cells during horizontal and diagonal drags

polling_interval_5_seconds.description: Polling runs every 5 seconds for reliable updates
polling_interval_5_seconds.evidence: Code at line 93 in PlayToLearnHost.js: setInterval(..., 5000)

mode_selection_broadcasts.description: Mode selection broadcasts to host for both LIVE and SELF_PACED sessions
mode_selection_broadcasts.evidence: Code at lines 885-893 in play_to_learn.py: await manager.send_to_host(...)

mode_badges_displayed.description: Host dashboard shows selected_mode badges for ALL_MODES sessions
mode_badges_displayed.evidence: Screenshot shows Memory (green), Quiz (purple), Fill (orange) badges for players

realtime_indicator.description: Real-time indicator with Zap icon visible
realtime_indicator.evidence: Screenshot shows 'Real-time' badge in top-right corner

connected_status.description: Connected status with WiFi icon visible
connected_status.evidence: Screenshot shows 'Connected' with green WiFi icon

code_fix_applied.issue: Duplicate return statement at line 170 (unreachable code)
code_fix_applied.fix: Removed the duplicate 'return { grid: gridArr, positions };' statement
